levels.name: First Swim
steps: This little fish is lost! Tap the glowing tile to rotate it.
When the water connects, the fish swims home by itself — and grabs stars on the way!

levels.name: Sliding Tides
steps: Some tiles slide instead of turning. Tap the rail tile to push it along its track!

levels.name: Rising Waters
steps: Water can flow uphill on ramps — but the moving platform must be raised to meet it. Tap it!

levels.name: Broken Aqueduct
steps: Deep in the temple, some tiles slide along rails instead of turning.

levels.name: Sunrise Shelf
steps: Golden ramps carry water uphill — raise the platform to meet them!

levels.name: First Falls
steps: Water spills over ledges! Fish can ride a waterfall DOWN — but never swim back up.

levels.name: First Whirl
steps: Whirlpools are twins — dive into one and you burst out of the other!

levels.name: Thin Ice
steps: Icy tiles crumble after ONE crossing — plan the order of your fish!
